== Notes for [[Item:Q115975|Q115975]] ==

Raymond III, Count of Toulouse

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Raymond III (died 978) was the Count of Toulouse, Nîmes, and Albi. He was the son of Raymond Pons and Garsenda, daughter of García II of Gascony.

Unmarried

Unmarried

Kinship II - A collection of family, friends and U.S. Presidents
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:2902060&id=I575149477
ID: I575149477
Name: Guillaume I TAILLEFER
Given Name: Guillaume I
Surname: TAILLEFER
Sex: M
Birth: Abt 0895 in Of, Angouleme, Charente, France
Death: 0956 in Unmarried
Change Date: 19 Mar 2003 1 1
Note: Ancestral File Number: KLC5-4B

Father: Alduin Of ANGOULEME b: Abt 0866 in Of, Angouleme, Charente, France
Mother: Mrs-Alduin Countess Of ANGOULEME b: Abt 0870 in Of, Angouleme, Charente, France

Marriage 1 Mrs-Guillaume TAILLEFER b: Abt 0900 in Of, Angouleme, Charente, France
Married: Abt 0923 in Of, Angoulesme, Charente, France
Note: _UID1254FC254DABED4DB51919C7147126B5C715
Children
Armand Manzer TAILLEFER b: Abt 0924 in Of, Angouleme, Charente, France

Sources:
Author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
Title: Ancestral File (R)
Publication: Copyright (c) 1987, June 1998, data as of 5 January 1998
Repository

Garsinde var grevinne av Narbonne. I 969 styrer hun også Narbonne og Gothien.
Hun ble oppkalt etter sin mormor, Garsinde, og anses utvilsomt å være datter til Odo av
Narbonne som var gift med hennes mor, Richilde.
Etter sin manns død styrte hun grevskapet Toulouse for sin sønn, i hvert fall i 972.
Omkring 974 setter hun opp sitt testamente og synes å være død samme år.

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Of Narbonne (Rouergue?)

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I15230
# ID: I15230
# Name: Raimond III Count of TOULOUSE 1 2 3 4 5
# Sex: M
# Title: [Duke of Aquitai
# Birth: ABT 920 in France 1 2 3 4 5
# Death: 961 1 2 3 4 5
# Ancestral File #: 9HMG-1D
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 5
# Change Date: 2 OCT 2001 2 3 4 5
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004


[daveanthes.FTW]

GIVN Raimond Iii, Count of
SURN Toulouse
NSFX [Duke of Aquitai
AFN 9HMG-1D
DATE 28 AUG 2000
TIME 22:20:10

EVEN
TYPE Acceded
DATE 924Duke of Aquitaine, Count of Auvergne.

OCCU Count Raymond III Pons...
SOUR HAWKINS.GED says ABT 899;
misc.traveller.com/genealogy/gedhtml/kmilburn says 921;
gendex.com/users/daver/rigney/D0001 says ABT 921;
SOUR COMYN4.TAF (Compuserve) says ABT 950
misc.traveller.com/genealogy/gedhtml/kmilburn/d0001/g0000081.htm#I2212 say 950
HAWKINS.GED says BEF 969; gendex.com/users/daver/rigney/D0001 says 1060
PAGE 25
QUAY 0
Count of Albi, Duke of Aquitaine, Mar. of Gothie - COMYNI.GED (Compuserve);
Count of Toulouse - Royalty for Commoners, Roderick W. Stuart, p. 145;
Raymond Pons, Count of Toulouse and Albi, Duke of Aquitaine, Marquis of Gothie
- p. 232; Count of Toulouse - HAWKINS.GED

Father: Raimond II Count of TOULOUSE b: ABT 895 in France
Mother: Guidinhlde of CARCASSONNE b: 897 in France

Marriage 1 Garsinde Countess Of TOULOUSE b: ABT 920 in France

* Married: ABT 946 in Of, France 1 2 3 4 5

Children

1. Has Children Luitgarde DE TOULOUSE b: ABT 942
2. Has Children Adelheid DE TOULOUSE b: 943


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: 21 Jan 2004
5. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004 Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I24640
# ID: I24640
# Name: Aldadus DE CHATEAURENAULT 1 2 3 4
# Sex: M
# Name: Aldadus DE CHATEAURENAULT 2 5 4
# Birth: ABT 940 in of, Chatelleraut, Vienne, France 1 2 3 5 4
# Death: BEF 987 1 2 3 5 4
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 4
# Change Date: 17 SEP 2001 2 3 5 4
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004


[daveanthes.FTW]

OCCU Vicomte de Chatellerault.
SOUR Royalty for Commoners, Roderick W. Stuart
PAGE 218
QUAY 1
SOUR Royalty for Commoners, Roderick W. Stuart
PAGE 218
QUAY 1
Airald, Vicomte de Chatellerault, 937-976 - Royalty for Commoners, Roderick W.
Stuart, p. 218[Spare.FTW]

Marriage 1 Garsinde Countess Of TOULOUSE b: ABT 920 in France

* Married: 969 1 2 3 5 4

# Children

1. Has Children Bosco DE CHATEAURENAULT b: ABT 988 in of, Chatelleraut, Vienne, France


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004
5. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: 21 Jan 2004

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
